title: citrus hillii
intro: Citrus hillii, also known as the yellow-footed citrus or hill's blood orange, is a species of citrus tree native to Southeast Asia. The plant contains various compounds with medicinal properties, including flavonoids, limonoids, and carotenoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Citrus hillii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
